name: antonio mari
note: ETH Zurich ML (probabilistic circuits, SAE interpretability). Identity verified via the co-event paper 'One-Step is Enough: Sparse Autoencoders for Text-to-Image Diffusion Models' with Chris Wendler + David Bau. S2 mis-merged that single ML paper into a prolific UROLOGIST's profile (2237239406, 49 papers); exclude_titles strips the 48 urology papers so only the SAE co-event remains. OpenAlex has no clean profile (raw 'Mari, Antonio' on the SAE work; bare-name search resolves to a UPC-Barcelona concrete engineer), so the OA side is intentionally null.

name: eric todd
note: Northeastern PhD (4th yr, advisor David Bau); undergrad ACME at BYU. Mechanistic interpretability — Function Vectors, NNsight/NDIF, Open Problems in Mech Interp, The Quest for the Right Mediator. Clean S2 profile (145290788), verified via 22 in-network co-event appearances in the cache + homepage ericwtodd.github.io. The 6 'basketball crowd noise' acoustics papers in the profile are his BYU undergrad work (kept; their non-roster coauthors prune out of the reveal graph). OpenAlex has no clean disambiguated profile (author search returns unrelated people), so the OA side is null; his S2 coverage is rich enough alone.

name: giordano rogers
note: Northeastern University, mechanistic interpretability (Google Scholar vkcZSNAAAAAJ, verified email northeastern.edu). In David Bau's lab orbit — co-author on the Bau Lab 'LLMs Process Lists With General Filter Heads' (with Arnab Sen Sharma, Natalie Shapira, David Bau) and 'Agents of Chaos' (Wendler, Pal, Belfki, Loftus, Prakash, Brinkmann, Rager, Ripa, Gandikota, Fiotto-Kaufman, Bau). Clean S2 profile (2388980977), 3 papers all 2025-26, verified via these in-network co-event appearances; single S2 match, no homonym fight. OpenAlex (A5009093200) is contaminated — it over-merges a 2003 'robotic surgery force feedback' paper by a different Giordano Rogers and duplicates Agents of Chaos, so the OA side is null; S2 alone is clean.
